title: This 26 y/o 10x'd Revenue Doing the Opposite of Every AI Startup | Paraform, John Kim
summary: John Kim built Paraform, a hiring platform that retained human recruiters rather than automating them away, and achieved 10x revenue growth while paying out over $50 million to recruiters. The company raised $65 million and works with customers like Palantir and Rippling by arguing that human judgment is a defensible moat in hiring, contrary to industry trends toward full automation.
